3. The user says "将棋をして" (play shogi) to Cursor, and the LLM (me) connects via MCP to the shogi app and plays

2. Use the MCP tools from the shogi app to start a game and make moves
3. When it's the user's turn, I need to wait for their move (wait_for_user_move or they tell me they moved)
